name: Tomcat startup / fatal failures
description: Tomcat could not start or stay up: OutOfMemoryError, port already in use, context/web-application failed to start, or the server lifecycle failed.
query: _msg:~"(OutOfMemoryError|Address already in use|Failed to start component|failed to start|could not be started|Error (starting|deploying)|LifecycleException|A child container failed during start|threw exception .* in its)"
